title: Full Tang Hunting and Fishing Guthook Blade Cleaning Knife 11 Inch
description:
This Full Tan Hunting and Fishing Guthook Blade Knife will satisfy all of your in field needs. This knife is great for hunting and performing specialized tasks such as skinning, caping , and boning. The 5.5" drop point blade is made of thick 1/4" 440 stainless steel and features a guthook for dressing game in the field. Full tang body the knife extends 11" featuring an ergonomic raised checkered grip for superior comfort and secure grip. Included with the knife is a heavy duty nylon sheath with protective insert. Perfect Hunting Knife for All of Your Game Dressing Needs!
